meta.homeDescription: Calm, conversion-focused website design for local businesses, startups, and creatives. Montreal-rooted, fully bilingual EN/FR.

home.aboutBody: Flowstate is a design studio focused on calm interfaces and conversion. Based in the Montreal spirit — bilingual, practical, and craft-obsessed.

work.description: Case studies across local business, product, and brand experiences.
work.ctaBody: Want results like this for your brand? Let’s scope a launch.

services.title: Services
services.description: Productized packages for common launches — plus custom work when your scope is unique.
services.customBody: App UI, multi-brand systems, or a rebuild with migration help — let’s scope it together.

about.title: About
about.lead: Flowstate Design helps ambitious brands ship websites that feel intentional and perform.
about.body: We blend visual craft with clear structure: message hierarchy, bilingual content, and motion that respects users. The name is the method — deep focus, fewer distractions, better outcomes.
about.locationBody: Rooted in Montreal with clients across Quebec and beyond. Every build can ship fully bilingual — EN and FR as first-class citizens.
